Class TacletInstantiationModel

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.control.instantiation_model.TacletInstantiationModel
public class TacletInstantiationModel extends Object

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    TacletInstantiationModel(TacletApp app, Sequent seq, NamespaceSet nss, AbbrevMap scm, Goal goal)
    Create new data model for the apply Taclet dialog wrapping a combo box model and a table model.

    void
    prepareUnmatchedInstantiation()
    replaces the TacletApp of this ApplyTacletDialogModel by an TacletApp where all name conflicts are resolved and thus the parser is enabled to accept variables from the context or the prefix of the Taclet.

      sets the manual if-input

    • prepareUnmatchedInstantiation

      public void prepareUnmatchedInstantiation()
      replaces the TacletApp of this ApplyTacletDialogModel by an TacletApp where all name conflicts are resolved and thus the parser is enabled to accept variables from the context or the prefix of the Taclet.

    • programVariables

      public Namespace<IProgramVariable> programVariables()
